code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut c0 = 0
mut c1 = 0
mut c2 = 0
mut c3 = 0
mut c4 = 0
mut c5 = 0
mut c6 = 0
mut c7 = 0
mut c8 = 0
mut c9 = 0

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
  match b
  when 48
    c0 = c0 + 1
  when 49
    c1 = c1 + 1
  when 50
    c2 = c2 + 1
  when 51
    c3 = c3 + 1
  when 52
    c4 = c4 + 1
  when 53
    c5 = c5 + 1
  when 54
    c6 = c6 + 1
  when 55
    c7 = c7 + 1
  when 56
    c8 = c8 + 1
  when 57
    c9 = c9 + 1
  when _
    i = i
  end
  i = i + 1
end

fn hashes(_ count: Int) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    s = "#{s}#"
    k = k + 1
  end
  s
end

println("0: #{hashes(c0)}")
println("1: #{hashes(c1)}")
println("2: #{hashes(c2)}")
println("3: #{hashes(c3)}")
println("4: #{hashes(c4)}")
println("5: #{hashes(c5)}")
println("6: #{hashes(c6)}")
println("7: #{hashes(c7)}")
println("8: #{hashes(c8)}")
println("9: #{hashes(c9)}")
